use_codes.desc: PREVENTION OF OVULATION IN A WOMAN

indications.text:
ORTHO EVRA is indicated for the prevention of pregnancy in women who elect to
use a transdermal patch as a method of contraception.
The pharmacokinetic profile for the ORTHO EVRA transdermal patch is different
from that of an oral contraceptive. Healthcare professionals should balance the higher
e...

use a transdermal patch as a method of contraception.
The pharmacokinetic profile for the ORTHO EVRA® transdermal patch is different
from that of an oral contraceptive. Healthcare professionals should balance the higher
e...

The pharmacokinetic profile for the ORTHO EVRA® transdermal patch is different
from that of an oral contraceptive. Healthcare professionals should balance the higher
e...

ORTHO EVRA is indicated for the prevention of pregnancy.
Like oral contraceptives, ORTHO EVRA is highly effective if used as recommended
in this label.
In 3 large clinical trials in North America, Europe and South Africa, 3,330 women
(ages 18-45) completed 22,155 cycles of ORTHO EVRA use, pregnan...

ORTHO EVRA is indicated for the prevention of pregnancy in women who elect to use a
transdermal patch as a method of contraception.
Limitation of Use:
• ORTHO EVRA may be less effective in preventing pregnancy in women who weigh
198 lbs (90 kg) or more.
